plugins.description: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern for Obsidian + Claude Cowork. JP default, EN fallback. Pre-release: interview-driven setup-claude-wiki landing; daily-log / add-page / query-wiki / lint-vault arrive in subsequent dev releases before the v0.1.0 stable cut.
